title: Vacancy for Financial Analyst at ICICI Prudential Life Global Group

jsonLd.title: Vacancy for Financial Analyst at ICICI Prudential Life Global Group
jsonLd.description:
ICICI Prudential Life Global Group invites applications from qualified candidates for the position of Financial Analyst at our Pune location. This role offers excellent career advancement prospects.

About ICICI Prudential Life Global Group:
ICICI Prudential Life Global Group is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Monitor financial performance against targets and provide variance analysis
• Process payroll and manage employee reimbursements
• Prepare and analyze financial statements, reports, and budgets
• Develop financial models and projections for business planning
• Monitor market trends and provide investment recommendations
• Manage accounts payable and accounts receivable functions
• Conduct due diligence for mergers, acquisitions, and investments

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Com / M.Com / MBA Finance
• 12-20 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Power BI
• Proficiency in Due Diligence
• Proficiency in Tally
• Proficiency in Risk Management
• Proficiency in Ind AS
• Proficiency in VBA
• Proficiency in MS Excel
• Proficiency in SAP FICO

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Professional development and training programs
• Life and accident insurance
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Annual performance appraisal
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Salary Range: 35 LPA - 70 LPA per annum

Location: Pune, Maharashtra, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with ICICI Prudential Life Global Group!
